raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "MMA fighters do not have a guaranteed source of income or retirement benefits once their careers have ended.",
    "Many MMA fighters have long-term injuries from their time in the ring.",
    "The MMA Pension Fund will be available to fighters over the age of 50 who have fought in 14 or more fights in California.",
    "California is the national leader in MMA, hosting the most fights and most fighters of any state.",
    "Elite MMA fighters have an average career length of 10 years, or on average 20 fights before retiring.",
    "The physically demanding nature of MMA means most fighters will only take on two to three fights a year to allow their bodies to recover.",
    "The MMA Pension Fund is the first of its kind in the world of MMA.",
    "The pension fund would not be funded by State dollars but through ticket sales, sports paraphernalia, and souvenirs.",
    "$1 from every ticket sold would go towards the MMA Fighters Pension Fund.",
    "The amount of money a fighter can collect in the pension fund will depend on the number of fights they have competed in and the length of their career."
  ]
}
```
